meta.title: Who We Serve | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.description: Fiduciary financial planning for pre-retirees, business owners, high-income professionals, families, and attorneys in Woodland Hills, CA and the greater Los Angeles area.
meta.ogTitle: Who We Serve | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.ogDescription: Fiduciary financial planning for pre-retirees, business owners, professionals, families, and attorneys.

hero.headline: Financial Planning Built Around Your Life
hero.subheadline: Every client's journey is unique. Our planning process adapts to your specific needs, goals, and stage of life.

intro.heading: We Work With People Like You
intro.body: At Prosperity Planning & Advisory, we don't believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Our clients come from different backgrounds, careers, and life stages — but they share a common goal: building a financial future they can feel confident about. Whether you're preparing for retirement, growing a business, or protecting your family's legacy, we tailor every recommendation to your unique situation.

audiences.title: Pre-Retirees & Recent Retirees
audiences.subtitle: Transitioning from saving to spending with confidence
audiences.body: You've spent decades building wealth — now it's time to make sure it lasts. We help pre-retirees and recent retirees navigate the critical transition from accumulation to distribution, addressing Social Security timing, Medicare coordination, tax-efficient withdrawal strategies, and sustainable income planning.
highlights: Portfolio transition from growth to income

audiences.title: Business Owners & Entrepreneurs
audiences.subtitle: Aligning your business success with personal financial goals
audiences.body: Running a business means your personal and professional finances are deeply connected. We help business owners build retirement plans, evaluate exit and succession strategies, optimize tax efficiency, and create a financial plan that supports both the business and the owner's long-term goals.
highlights: Retirement plan design (401(k), SEP IRA, Defined Benefit)
Cash flow optimization for business and personal finances

audiences.title: High-Income Professionals
audiences.subtitle: Making the most of what you earn
audiences.body: High earnings create unique financial challenges — from managing tax exposure to maximizing retirement contributions and building wealth beyond your career. We help physicians, executives, engineers, and other professionals develop strategies that turn high income into lasting financial security.
highlights: Stock option and equity compensation strategies
Backdoor Roth IRA and mega backdoor strategies

audiences.title: Families & Multigenerational Planning
audiences.subtitle: Protecting what matters most — today and for generations ahead
audiences.body: Family financial planning goes beyond budgets and savings accounts. We help families coordinate education planning, estate strategies, risk management, and wealth transfer — so your values and your wealth endure across generations.
highlights: Life insurance and risk management review

audiences.title: Tax & Legacy Planning Clients
audiences.subtitle: Proactive strategies for complex financial situations
audiences.body: When your financial life becomes more complex, you need a planning partner who can help you coordinate across tax, estate, and investment decisions. We work alongside your CPA and attorney to design strategies that minimize tax exposure, protect assets, and create a purposeful legacy.
highlights: Coordinated planning with your tax and legal team

audiences.title: Attorney Advisory Clients
audiences.subtitle: Financial clarity for professionals with variable income and complex needs
audiences.body: Attorneys face unique financial challenges — from managing variable income (especially in litigation and contingency-based practices) to navigating partnership buy-ins, deferred compensation, and retirement planning. We provide the disciplined, strategic guidance that helps legal professionals build long-term financial stability.
highlights: Retirement planning for solo and firm attorneys
Coordination with your existing legal and tax professionals

ctaBand.heading: See Yourself Here?
ctaBand.body: No matter where you are on your financial journey, we're here to help you take the next step with clarity and confidence.
